summary: lean-interact v0.11.3 is the clear choice: supports v4.8.0-rc1 through v4.30.0-rc2 covering v4.27.0-rc1, provides LocalProject loading with no lakefile changes, and is already declared in pyproject.toml. LeanDojo-v2 is heavyweight/wrong tool. PyPantograph has a hard version-pin blocker.

artifacts.summary: Full compatibility analysis: lean-interact wins, LeanDojo-v2 rejected, PyPantograph blocked. Includes API examples, latency estimates, two-path integration strategy, and next steps for Task 15+.
